case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. AMIR NADER FARMANDRAD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT FARMANDRAD, AMIR NADER ,AN INDIVIDUAL , DBA THE DETAIL SHOP AND DBA STAR DETAILING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
